query:
SELECT 
  ec.id AS companyId,
  ec.companyName,
  GROUP_CONCAT(sr.ruleType ORDER BY sr.ruleType) AS existingRules
FROM erp_companies ec
LEFT JOIN sku_rules sr ON ec.id = sr.erpCompanyId
GROUP BY ec.id, ec.companyName
ORDER BY ec.id;
